title: Nordstrom teases retail’s other big summer sale
description: The department store’s annual event differs from most because it features discounts on merchandise set to drop in the fall.

title: Staples, Dollar General tout 2025 pricing for back-to-school sales
description: Both retailers highlighted dozens of products priced at $1 and under, with teachers getting extra discounts.

title: New Ecommerce Tools: July 7, 2026
description:
This week's rundown includes new services for livestreaming, product images, logistics, agentic commerce, one-click checkout, Amazon, and more.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: July 7, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.

title: Home Depot adds rewards for Pro Xtra customers
description:
Home Depot has added rewards for Pro customers that include partnering with 7-Eleven, Jimmy John’s, Tecovas and Rosie’s AI Answering Service. The new benefits are for Home Depot’s Pro Xtra members, available through the retailer’s Rewards Hub. Home Depot said the rewards are available regardless of customers’ spending or membership tier. “True partnership means understanding […]
The post Home Depot adds rewards for Pro Xtra customers appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Batteries Plus’ modernization journey prepared it for agentic AI
description:
Consumer electronics retailer Batteries Plus has made a deliberate, multi-year modernization journey that it said has positioned it to scale artificial intelligence (AI) across its business. Karthik Jambulingam, senior director of enterprise architecture, shared with Digital Commerce 360 how Batteries Plus has transitioned its core systems to a scalable, cloud-enabled, and data-driven infrastructure. His team […]
The post Batteries Plus’ modernization journey prepared it for agentic AI appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Dick’s Sporting Goods adds $99 membership tier to loyalty program
description:
Dick’s Sporting Goods introduced a new paid membership tier to its ScoreCard loyalty program, ScoreCard+. The paid rewards program gives members free shipping on all orders, 20% off in-store services and other benefits for $99 per year, the sports supply retailer said. Dick’s Sporting Goods also announced updates to its free loyalty program. “Our enhanced […]
The post Dick’s Sporting Goods adds $99 membership tier to loyalty program appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Resideo board sets schedule for ADI spinoff
description:
Resideo Technologies Inc. and ADI Global Distribution remain on track to split, following the Resideo board of directors’ vote to approve key dates in July and August. Following a record date of July 20 for the spinoff, Resideo expects distribution of the ADI shares to occur on Aug. 3. Then, ADI common stock is set […]
The post Resideo board sets schedule for ADI spinoff appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.

title: Marketing’s data breakdown: H1 by the numbers
description: Artificial intelligence continues to demand significant investments this year, but the payoff for marketers is still unclear.

title: The best brand campaigns of H1 2026 sold honesty. Are consumers buying?
description: As fake news, fake feeds and fake AI proliferate, Coca-Cola, Dove, Anthropic and other brands tried to leave a real mark in the first half.

title: Brands Briefing: Salomon is working to double its US store count by 2028
description: Sporting-goods company Salomon is going "city by city" as it looks to grow its retail presence in the U.S., executives say. The brand is considering opening stores in Boston, San Francisco and Miami.

title: Meta just launched a new AI generator, Muse Image, and users are already pushing back over use of their photos
description: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising and decorating, and creator-based opportunities.

title: Criteo is subject to a takeover bid, further proving private equity’s continued interest in ad tech
description: Vista Equity and Quinti Capital place a 50% premium on stock, raising questions over where the PE firms see value.

title: [AINews] Lilian Weng summarizes 35 papers on Harness Engineering for RSI
description: a quiet day lets us read some condensed insight

title: Hot French startup ZML releases free product to speed inference across lots of AI chips
description: ZML, a hot French AI startup endorsed by Turing Award winner Yann LeCun, has now released ZML/LLMD, software that could make running AI less costly.

title: AI chip maker SambaNova raises $1B at $11B valuation, 5 months after last mega round
description: AI chip maker SambaNova has raised at an $11B valuation months after Intel was rumored to be trying to buy it for about $1.6 billion.
